name: codex-obsidian
description: Bundled Codex plugin for Obsidian writing, open formats, and official desktop CLI workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Bundled Obsidian skills for writing and official CLI workflows
interface.longDescription: Packages docs-first writing, Obsidian markdown and open-format skills, and focused official desktop CLI workflows for notes, bases, bookmarks, runtime admin, devtools, sync, workspace navigation, and orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-obsidian-writer to draft an ADR and link it to related notes.
Use codex-obsidian-markdown to clean up this Obsidian note.
Use codex-obsidian-cli to read a note from my vault through the official desktop obsidian CLI.
Use codex-obsidian-cli-workflows with workflow_id=tasks.rollup mode=preview output=json.
